name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Here's how MoviePass works:

Tap 🎟 Subscribe to see our plans and start streaming.
Tap 📋 My Plan to check your subscription status.
Tap 💳 Payment History to see past charges.
Tap 💬 Support if you need help.

Everything is button-driven — just tap below!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
